parameters.query: SELECT characteristic_id, characteristic_name FROM catalogs.characteristics WHERE marketplace = $1 AND is_active = true AND name_ro IS NULL ORDER BY characteristic_id LIMIT $2::INTEGER;
UPDATE catalogs.characteristics SET name_ro = $2, name_ro_source = 'gemini', name_ro_translated_at = NOW() WHERE marketplace = $1 AND characteristic_id = $3 AND ($2 IS NOT NULL);
